meta.source: IRS Exempt Organizations Business Master File + US Census ZCTA Gazetteer
meta.attribution: US environmental and animal-welfare nonprofits (IRS EO BMF, public domain), located at ZIP-code centroids (US Census, public domain), sized by log10 of latest reported revenue.
meta.license: US Government public domain (IRS SOI + US Census)
meta.disclosure: US tax-exempt organizations in NTEE groups C (Environment) and D (Animal-Related). Positions are coarse ZIP-code centroids, not street addresses. Sized by log10 of latest reported revenue.
meta.trimmed_note: Org-level public fields only. ZIP-centroid lat/lon dropped: the mailer has no use for a location finer than city/state. No individuals, no contact data, no PII.
